headline: Sherwin-Williams Increases Freight Utilization by 11% with Retail Store Delivery Solution by ITS Logistics

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Sherwin-Williams, Raises Price Target to $400
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Greg Melich   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $390 to $400.
